name: Vessel Ember
summary: The Vessel Ember is a premium, modern ashtray engineered for customers who value clean design and high-quality materials.
description: The Vessel Ember is a premium, modern ashtray engineered for customers who value clean design and high-quality materials. Crafted from solid brass and finished with a protective cork base, this accessory adds a refined touch to any smoking setup while keeping surfaces safe and scratch-free. Designed for dry herb users, roll-your-own sessions, and desktop consumption setups, the Ember delivers reliable performance in any environment. Its weight, stability, and minimalist profile make it a standout accessory for both personal and retail lounge use. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.

specs.label: Weight
specs.value: approx. 4.4 oz (125 g) for a solid, stable hold
